name: standalone_gaiji

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.4 + JIS X 0213 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION external_character.html 2026-06-20] A corpus-attested tolerant extension: the same [#description、address] reference WITHOUT the leading reference mark, used by some 凡例 as a standalone descriptive note. Resolution is identical to the gaiji vector (men-ku-ten 1-85-54 -> U+6798 枘 via Annex B) and it serialises back without a reference mark. Tagged should, not must: the reference-mark form is canonical; the no-mark form is a tolerated corpus convention.

source: 珍しき木［＃「木＋吶のつくり」、第3水準1-85-54］が立つ。

expected.html: 珍しき木枘が立つ。
expected.serialize: 珍しき木［＃「木＋吶のつくり」、第3水準1-85-54］が立つ。
